title: Ultrahuman overhauls its app, brings all of its analysis on-device - Engadget
summary: The second biggest innovation is in something the company is calling Ultrasphere, a "decision engine" which generates a series of "next best actions." Essentially, the company's homegrown AI, Jade, will look at your vital signs and contextual data to offer tips on…
